title: The Grid
overview: “The Grid” is an intense two-player strategy board game, where players race to be first to get their pieces into the home base using teleports, blocking tactics and pure logic.
contribution: The full game was developed together as a group, and I wrote the ruleset.
process: Through repeated playtests, the design evolved from a simple race-to-the-end concept into a more complex system incorporating different wall zones and restrictions, bonus blocks, and teleporting squares, which significantly increased strategic depth. A key design decision was changing the win condition from getting all six pieces home, to allowing one piece to remain as a dedicated defender, creating more meaningful endgames and reducing repetitive “last piece” races. The playtesting process highlighted the game’s main strength: multiple viable strategies with no dominant approach.It also highlighted a notable weakness: players could exploit a teleport-plus-bonus-block loop to advance pieces repeatedly along the same route, creating shallower gameplay.
